title: GARDEN HAND FORK WITH WOOD HANDLE
features: This garden hand fork is an ideal gardening tool for many uses around your garden. Often used for digging up weeds, hand forks are sometimes referred to as weeding forks.

A hand fork is also suited for other jobs such as preparing planting holes, transplanting, aerating and mixing additives into your soil and are indispensable for levelling around border edges and tidying up your soil.

The fork measures 26cm x 7.5cm approximately and features an easy grip glossed wooden handle along with a durable metal head. The handles also includes a drilled out hole which enables you to add a hanging loop if required. A must have compact gardening tool for all your gardening needs.
